title: Is it possible to auto-assign the task to the creator of the task?
excerpt: It seems users are adding tasks but forgetting to assign them to themselves or others to the task. There is an automation that will automatically assign new tasks to a specific person but there isn’t an option to auto-as…

posts.author: michael_adams1 (Michael Adams)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems users are adding tasks but forgetting to assign them to themselves or others to the task. There is an automation that will automatically assign new tasks to a specific person but there isn’t an option to auto-assign based on the “creator of the task”.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @michael_adams1

We’ve seen this request before so I might merge this with another topic.

My workaround for now would be to add a creation log column and you can call it “whose task” so if they forget to assign, you can at least see it from this column?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
@michael_adams1 You can add your vote to this earlier similar request:

Assign person column based on creator of pulse Feature requests
I would like the ability to set an owner column based on the creator of the pulse. Right now, in automations, I can only set a certain team or person.

posts.author: MaxCR86 (Max C. Reuveni)
posts.cookedHtml:
We recognized the same need.
Many tasks are left orphaned until finally being noticed.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JohnW and @MaxCR86 - great news! We released a new recipe that should solve this for you:
Does that work for what you’re looking for? Cheers!

posts.author: MaxCR86 (Max C. Reuveni)
posts.cookedHtml: I am honestly blown away by the level of your service!

posts.author: bloc75 (Nick Toye)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great, but am I right in understanding that this doesn’t affect the subitems?

posts.author: viniciusoh (Vinícius Henriques)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want an automation like: “When Status changed to to Approved, assign changer as Approved by”, is it possible?
It would be better having one of the persons options to be “person that triggered” so it be more flexible.

posts.author: David_Faibish (David Faibish)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I change the owner to the creator after a status change ?
